datasets.name: Example liver CT segmentation benchmark
datasets.short_description: Curated abdominal CT subset for benchmarking liver organ segmentation; synthetic-style metadata for catalogue testing only.
datasets.access_notes: Contact the group data steward; no public download.

datasets.name: Longitudinal CT
datasets.short_description: Longitudinal-CT is a publicly available longitudinal whole-body CT dataset of 300 melanoma patients, each with baseline and follow-up imaging for therapy response assessment. It provides anonymized NIfTI CT scans, manual tumor segmentation masks, lesion center coordinates, and lesion-level metadata including location, volume, topology changes, and lesion linking across timepoints. The dataset is designed for AI research on longitudinal lesion detection, segmentation, tracking, and therapy-response analysis in oncology.
